title: Buy jet fuel from US or 'take it yourself' from Hormuz: Trump to allies
content: US President Donald Trump criticised its allies stating that the countries facing jet fuel shortages due to Iran's control of the Strait of Hormuz should source their own oil. Trump also accused France of being unhelpful regarding Iran as tensions are escalating in the Middle East, impacting global oil prices.

title: 'Chennai offered double of BCCI's prize': Culture that made CSK a champion
content: Chennai Super Kings' enduring IPL success stems from consistent ownership and player retention. Stephen Fleming's long tenure as coach has fostered a winning culture. A unique tradition sees the franchise double BCCI prize money for players, showcasing their commitment to welfare. This approach has built a stable, experienced team.

title: End of Red Terror? How close India is to its Naxal-free target as Amit Shah’s March 31 deadline ends
content: India stands on the cusp of eradicating Naxalism, with Union Home Minister Amit Shah declaring the movement effectively dismantled.  Decades of development and security operations have significantly shrunk the Red Corridor, pushing the insurgency into isolated pockets.  While armed rebellion may be over, securing lasting peace through governance remains crucial.

title: Oracle layoffs: Employees in India, US, & other regions receive email at 6am
content: Oracle has started laying off employees across its global offices, with workers receiving termination emails at 6AM from "Oracle Leadership" informing them their roles had been eliminated. Teams like RHS, SVOS, and NetSuite IDC were among the first hit. The job cuts could hit 20,000 to 30,000 people—roughly 18% of Oracle's workforce—as the company looks to free up cash for its AI data centre push.

title: Stray bullet kills ex-brigadier: How Dehradun nightclub bill dispute spiraled into road shootout
content: A retired Brigadier, Mukesh Kumar Joshi, was tragically killed by a stray bullet during an exchange of fire between occupants of two SUVs. The incident, initially thought to be road rage, stemmed from a billing dispute at a nightclub the previous night. Police have arrested four individuals and are pursuing others involved in the deadly confrontation.

title: Starting April 1, USCIS alert says that the immigration authority will reject forms
content: USCIS will only accept the 02/27/26 edition of Form I-129 for H-1B and other visa applications starting April 1, 2026. The updated form requires employers to detail educational requirements and experience, aligning with the Department of Labor's wage level assignments for the new wage-weighted lottery system.

title: Was Trump destined to plunge world into war?
content: The notion lives on in a post-colonial society where English – and who has access to it – is a marker of civility and civilisation. The Higgins-Macaulay Complex continues to haunt post-colonial societies, but there are times when the English language can be oddly prescient.

title: America's biggest defence tech company Palantir to help IRS detect taxation fraud
content: The IRS has partnered with Palantir for a new tool, SNAP, to enhance audit selection and investigations. This $1.8 million contract aims to overcome the agency's outdated technology. SNAP analyzes existing data to identify potential tax discrepancies in areas like disaster relief and energy credits, marking a significant upgrade from older methods.

title: Court gives time to Priya Kapur in Rs 30k inheritance row with Mandhira Kapur Smith
content: A legal battle over a Rs 30,000 crore inheritance is intensifying. Following businessman Sunjay Kapur's death, his wife Priya has filed a defamation case against his sister, Mandhira. The court granted Priya time to respond to Mandhira's request for specific documents related to the ongoing defamation proceedings.

title: Pakistan's Fakhar Zaman banned for ball-tampering in PSL
content: "Match Referee Roshan Mahanama conducted the disciplinary hearing and made the determination after reviewing all evidence," the statement added.

title: BCCI issues statement on death of IPL 2026 broadcast engineer
content: Langford, 76, was found unconscious in his hotel room in south Mumbai on Monday morning and was taken to Bombay Hospital, where he was declared dead. Police said no suspicious findings were reported in the postmortem, and a case of unnatural death has been registered.

title: Ex-Army captain on the run after murdering wife caught after LPG booking reveals his hideout
content: Convicted former army captain Sandeep Tomar, on the run for four years after being sentenced for strangulating his wife, has been arrested in Madhya Pradesh. His capture followed a coordinated effort by Fazilka police and NATGRID, who traced him through digital footprints, including financial transactions and an LPG refill. Tomar was apprehended in Pandhurna district, ending a high-profile pursuit.

title: 'Dhurandhar 2' BO Day 13: Ranveer Singh-starrer eyes Rs 900 crore net milestone
content: 'Dhurandhar 2: The Revenge' continues its record-breaking run on day 13, surpassing the lifetime India net of 'Dhurandhar Part 1' in just 11 days. With a domestic net of Rs. 873.99 crore and a worldwide gross nearing Rs. 1,400 crore, the Ranveer Singh starrer is successfully defying the IPL 2026 season craze. Directed by Aditya Dhar, the film is now chasing the Rs. 900 crore and eventually the Rs. 1000 crore India net milestone, a feat previously seen only by the Allu Arjun starrer 'Pushpa 2.'

title: BJP releases Kerala manifesto: Rs 3,000 pension, AIIMS and big Sabarimala promise
content: The BJP's Kerala election manifesto pledges a Rs 3,000 monthly welfare pension for needy women and seniors, alongside 20,000 litres of free water per household. The party also promised two free LPG cylinders annually for poor families and a Rs 2,500 monthly health card. Key development plans include an AIIMS and a high-speed rail network.

title: Candace Owens questions Charlie Kirk murder probe over 'no evidence' claim
content: Candace Owens has reignited debate over the killing of Charlie Kirk after reports claimed the bullet recovered from his body did not match Tyler Robinson’s rifle. She criticized those who supported the case against Robinson, calling the evidence “non existent.” While investigators cite alleged confessions, the new forensic detail has raised fresh questions and intensified public scrutiny around the trial.

title: IndiGo appoints former British Airways chief William Walsh as new CEO
content: IndiGo Airlines has appointed former British Airways chief William Walsh as its new CEO, effective August 3, 2026. This strategic move follows the resignation of Pieter Elbers earlier this month. Walsh, currently with IATA, brings extensive global aviation experience and a customer-focused leadership style to guide IndiGo's next phase of growth and transformation.

title: ‘I’ll quit when I’m bored’: Shami on retirement despite repeated India snubs
content: Veteran pacer Mohammed Shami has stated retirement is not on his mind, emphasising he will only step away when he feels bored, not due to age, selection, or injuries. Despite being out of the national setup for over a year, Shami remains focused on his performance and enjoying the game, aiming to deliver for his new team, Lucknow Super Giants.

title: I-T changes from April 1: Top 10 things salaried taxpayers should know about new rules
content: Several changes are expected to reduce the tax burden for the salaried class in general. We take a look at top 10 things salaried taxpayers should know going into the new financial year 2026-27:

title: Bengaluru techie jumps to death from 17th floor after finding partner dead in locked room
content: A techie couple from Telangana died tragically within minutes of each other in Bengaluru's Kothanur area. The husband was found hanging in a locked room, and his wife subsequently jumped from the 17th floor of their apartment building. Police are investigating multiple angles, including health, relationship issues, and emotional distress.

title: 27-year-old Indian-origin man shot dead in Canada’s Surrey
content: A 27-year-old man of Indian origin, Jasman Sekhon, was fatally shot in Surrey, Canada, in what authorities suspect is a targeted attack linked to organized crime and the drug trade. The brazen incident occurred Saturday evening, with witnesses reporting a chase before the shooting.

title: Brittany Mahomes reacts to Randi Mahomes’ emotional message on Patrick
content: Brittany Mahomes’ induction into the University of Texas at Tyler Athletics Hall of Fame highlights her own athletic journey, separate from her public life today. A former collegiate standout who briefly played professionally in Iceland, she remains connected to her roots. Her heartfelt speech and the support from Randi Mahomes reflect both personal pride and a continued commitment to uplifting women’s sports.

title: IPL 2026 tragedy: British broadcast engineer found dead in Mumbai hotel
content: A 76-year-old British broadcast engineer, Jan William Langford, working for the IPL 2026 in Mumbai, was found dead in his hotel room. Hotel staff discovered him unconscious and he was declared dead on arrival at the hospital. Police have registered a case of accidental death after a postmortem revealed no suspicious findings.

title: West Bengal polls: Mamata writes to EC, demands halt to fake voter entries in SIR
content: West Bengal Chief Minister Mamata Banerjee has alerted the Election Commission about a 'grave conspiracy' to manipulate electoral rolls ahead of the polls. She alleges the BJP, in league with the ECI, is attempting to add non-residents to voter lists, a process she claims has already caused hardship and deaths. Banerjee demands an immediate halt to this 'undemocratic exercise'.

title: 'So-called defender of Hinduism says nothing about Sabarimala': Rahul takes dig at PM Modi
content: Rahul Gandhi accused Prime Minister Modi of selectively raising religious issues, questioning his silence on the alleged Sabarimala gold theft. Gandhi claimed an understanding between the BJP and Kerala's ruling LDF, suggesting Modi controls Chief Minister Vijayan. He asserted the CPI(M) has become an extreme right-wing party, aligning with the BJP.

title: PSSSB Group D admit card released: Check direct link to download
content: The Punjab Subordinate Services Selection Board (PSSSB) has released the Group D Admit Card 2026 on its official website, sssb.punjab.gov.in. Candidates can download their hall tickets by entering their registration number and date of birth. The admit card is essential for entry and contains crucial exam details, with candidates advised to verify information and adhere to exam day guidelines.

title: Fast-track to Team India? Calls for Sooryavanshi's senior debut grow
content: Teenage sensation Vaibhav Sooryavanshi's IPL heroics have sparked calls for his fast-tracking into India's T20 squad, with former cricketers like Mohammad Kaif and Piyush Chawla backing his readiness. However, former India spinner Ravichandran Ashwin urges caution, emphasising the need to manage expectations for the 15-year-old prodigy, despite acknowledging his immense talent.

title: Art heist in Italy: Masterpieces worth millions stolen from museum in three minutes
content: Thieves have stolen three priceless paintings from the Magnani Rocca Foundation near Parma. The artworks by Renoir, Cezanne, and Matisse were taken overnight. Police suspect an organized group was behind the swift burglary. The incident follows a series of high-profile art thefts across Europe. Experts suggest such thefts may be linked to ransom demands.

title: 'Fierce falling contest between rupee and BJP's image': Akhilesh Yadav
content: Samajwadi Party leader Akhilesh Yadav criticized the BJP, drawing a parallel between the falling rupee and the party's tarnished image due to alleged corruption. Opposition leaders, including Congress, amplified attacks on the BJP, highlighting public suffering from rising prices of essential goods and unreliable utilities, exacerbated by the Iran war

title: US drops 900kg bomb on Isfahan: How 'bunker buster' dismantled Iran's defences
content: A formidable impact was felt as a bunker buster bomb detonated near Isfahan, targeting an Iranian ammunition stockpile and underscoring the intensified conflict. Iran's elaborate network of underground tunnels, once a shield, has transformed into a focal point for the American-Israeli coalition's military strategy.

title: 'Consider me your candidate in all 294 seats': Mamata's pitch in Bengal battle
content: West Bengal Chief Minister Mamata Banerjee urged voters to support her leadership across all 294 constituencies, positioning herself as the face of the Trinamool Congress. She also alleged that the BJP is attempting to manipulate voter rolls by including individuals from other states and targeting deletions, accusing the party of acting in concert with the Election Commission.

title: Amid US-Iran war, India’s diesel exports see big 20% jump; petrol exports fall 33%
content: Although crude prices have surged amid the near shutdown of the Strait of Hormuz, the effect has differed across fuels. Crack spreads for diesel and jet fuel have climbed to new highs, whereas those for petrol have remained broadly stable.

title: 'Ramayana': Ranbir Kapoor bowls audience over with 'Rama' first glimpse
content: Ranbir Kapoor's 'Ramayana' teaser, 'Rama', premiered in Los Angeles, captivating audiences with its breathtaking scale and vision. Director Nitesh Tiwari and producer Namit Malhotra joined Kapoor for a Q&A, sharing insights into the epic's creation. Attendees praised the film's emotional depth and Kapoor's respectful connection, eagerly anticipating its Diwali 2026 release.

title: After Rahane's 'ask CA' jibe; AUS head coach comes in support of Cameron Green
content: Cameron Green's all-round potential is under scrutiny as Australia's coach Andrew McDonald emphasizes balancing IPL and national team expectations. Despite a back niggle, Green's fitness won't hinder his consideration for all formats, with selectors eyeing him for the vacant No. 5 Test position.

title: Chanchal Kumar appointed Information and Broadcasting Secretary, Sanjay Lohiya to be Financial Services Secretary
content: Sanjay Lohiya, Additional Secretary, Ministry of Mines has been appointed as Special Secretary, Department of Financial Services, Ministry of Finance.

title: Women achievers from different sectors honoured with award
content: The event was organised at the Sri Srinivasa Raghogi Auditorium of the Kalyana Karnataka Chamber of Commerce and Industry in Kalaburagi

title: Assembly Election LIVE: BJP trying to include outsiders in Bengal poll list through Form 6 applications, Mamata writes to CEC
content: BJP’s ‘Sankalp Patra’ comprises 31 promises, including the recovery of encroached land from Bangladeshi Miyas, bringing in Uniform Civil Code, and ensuring the development of the State, employment opportunities for youths

title: Students told to improve adaptability, digital skills and leadership qualities
content: Addressing students of Siddhartha Academy of Higher Education (Deemed To Be University), A.P. Chamber of Commerce and Industry Federation executive vice-president says there is a lot of scope for youngsters to exhibit their talent these days

title: Kerala Assembly polls 2026: Latin Catholic community seeks concrete action beyond release of J.B. Koshy panel report
content: Father Eugene H. Pereira of the Latin Catholic Church has expressed concerns that without concrete government action on pressing issues like climate change, sea erosion, and inadequate infrastructure, the report’s release will fall short of addressing the community’s needs.

title: Call for stronger efforts in addressing issues faced by women workers
content: Left organisations stage demonstration in Kalaburagi, submit through the Deputy Commissioner memorandum addressed to the Chief Minister

title: Calcutta HC dismisses PIL petition challenging transfers of officers by EC in poll-bound Bengal
content: The poll panel has transferred several officers, including the State’s chief secretary, home secretary and Director General of Police (DGP), after announcing the schedule of the Assembly polls

title: Work on Mulapeta greenfield port in Srikakulam district progressing rapidly, says Minister Janardhan Reddy
content: While the YSRCP dispensation completed only 25% of the work, the NDA government has executed 44% of the work in the last 20 months, and targets to complete the project by December 2026, the Minister asserts

title: On Minister’s fiat, Dasara jumbo Gajendra shifted to Nagarahole camp
content: Acting on public concerns and a social media campaign, Forest Minister Eshwar Khandre ordered relocation of the 63-year-old elephant from an elephant camp in Chamarajanagar to Mattigodu camp in Nagarahole

title: Bihar stampede highlights: Nine dead in stampede at Nalanda temple; State Govt. announces ₹6 lakh ex-gratia for victims
content: Bihar Chief Secretary to initiate probe; locals allege lack of security arrangements to control crowd

title: Case booked against TVK candidate in Poonamallee for alleged sexual harassment
content: On March 31, 2026, the victim, accompanied by her husband, submitted a complaint at the Tiruvallur District Superintendent of Police's office, seeking action against Prakash

title: Andhra Pradesh Governor Abdul Nazeer prays at Tirumala temple
content: TTD authorities  welcome the Governor at the temple’s Mahadwaram and extend him the traditional ‘Istikapal’ honours

title: Census 2027 to be entirely in digital mode
content: The exercise, originally scheduled for 2021, has been delayed due to COVID-19 and is now being taken up in 2027

title: Niranthara Foundation’s Kannada play ‘Party’ from April 3 to 5
content: The play will be staged at the Mini Theatre (Kiru Rangamandira) on Kalamandira premises; the show will begin on three days at 7 p.m.

title: Tamil Nadu election: Complaint against Vijay, TVK cadre for conducting roadshow in violation of poll code in Perambur
content: The complaint stated that permission was granted to the TVK to conduct election campaigning only between 5 p.m. and 6 p.m., with a maximum of 500 participants and the use of five sound systems. These norms were violated, it said

title: Voters from outside Bengal being enrolled, says Mamata, slams EC
content: West Bengal Chief Minister Mamata Banerjee writes to Chief Election Commissioner, says Form 6 applications could be from individuals “who are not genuine residents of Bengal and are being imported to tilt the vote share”

title: East, central and northwest India to witness more heatwave days than usual: IMD
content: The rainfall during April 2026, averaged over the country as a whole, is most likely to be above normal

title: Hyderabad food unit owner nabbed for manufacturing adulterated ginger-garlic paste
content: Officials found the unit was operating in highly unsanitary conditions, using inferior quality raw materials, including garlic peels

title: Tamil Nadu Election 2026: full list of AIADMK candidates
content: All India Anna Dravida Munnetra Kazhagam or the AIADMK, the party led by Edappadi K. Palaniswami, is contesting in 167 seats as part of the National Democratic Alliance (NDA) in Tamil Nadu during the upcoming Assembly election in the State.

title: HC seeks response of Centre on plea regarding Sikh articles seized during Operation Blue Star
content: The petitioner sought directions to the SGPC for the whereabouts of the religious texts, manuscripts and other articles that were allegedly seized during Operation Blue Star and given to the SGPC; during an earlier hearing, the SGPC said some items were returned and some articles were still in the possession of the CBI, the Centre and the Army

title: 'False, fabricated': Rijiju slams Opposition over claims on FCRA Amendment Bill
content: The proposed amendment Bill has been brought only to regulate foreign funding into India, only to check misuse of funds in any illegal activity, he said

title: T.N. Assembly poll an opportunity for voters to choose between Modi and Stalin: Udhayanidhi
content: He was addressing party cadre and residents in Tiruvannamalai to seek votes for incumbent Tiruvannamalai MLA and Minister for Highways E.V. Velu

title: Kerala Assembly polls 2026: SDPI slams Satheesan, warns of withdrawing support to UDF in Manjeswaram
content: SDPI urges Congress to make its stand clear after Leader of the Opposition V.D. Satheesan reportedly asserted that the UDF does not require SDPI votes.

title: Kerala Assembly polls 2026: Pinarayi Vijayan dares Rahul Gandhi to explain how Sabarimala gold theft case accused entered Sonia Gandhi’s residence
content: Kerala Chief Minister’s comments came in response to Rahul Gandhi’s parody targeting the LDF and allegations of a tacit alliance between the BJP and the CPI(M). The CM also raised the cash-for-seat controversy surrounding the Congress’s national leadership.

title: Russian artist's photo shoot with elephant painted pink in Rajasthan draws ire
content: The pachyderm died last month, her owner has confirmed, while officials said the photo shoot had no connection with her death

title: Kerala Assembly polls 2026: In Kottarakara, it’s a test of personal loyalty versus party machinery
content: With former CPI(M) MLA P. Aisha Potty now challenging LDF’s K.N. Balagopal as a Congress candidate and R. Reshmi’s move from the UDF to the NDA camp, the election in Kottarakara will test if personal loyalty can outweigh party allegiances in the region.

title: Garden city Bengaluru’s heat islands hit labourers, traffic personnel the hardest
content: Nearly 44% of the city’s workforce is engaged in outdoor occupations, and for them, heat pockets translate into prolonged exposure with no scope for relief

title: Bill to recognise Amaravati as A.P. capital likely to be tabled in Lok Sabha
content: The move follows a resolution passed by the Andhra Pradesh Assembly on March 28 urging the Centre to amend the law to establish Amaravati as the State’s capital

title: Various departments in Maharashtra ignored over 10,000 audit queries, says CAG; flags ₹891 crore possible lapses
content: The CAG, in the report tabled in the recently concluded budget session of the State Assembly, criticised the delay by departments in filing action taken notes (ATNs), stating that the State's inability to address queries in 2,408 inspection reports (IRs) showed "legislative oversight".

title: Students beautify college walls with murals and Hase Chittara patterns in Shivamogga district of Karnataka
content: Students Rihan A. and Meghana K.S. have transformed the walls of Sahyadri Commerce and Management College in Shivamogga into vibrant canvases, showcasing their artistic talent through colourful murals and traditional Hase chittara designs

title: Free power scheme for weavers rolled out across Andhra Pradesh from Wednesday
content: The subsidy would translate into annual savings of ₹8,640 for handloom workers and ₹21,600 for powerloom operators, officials said

title: At least one village in every district to be developed as model solar village, says Minister for Energy
content: Minister Ravi Kumar directed officials to ensure timely completion of solar projects while maintaining standards; he also called for increasing awareness among consumers on the use of solar panels

title: Falling margins, rising costs: Chicken shops in Hyderabad to shut from April 1
content: Chicken traders said they are falling victim to the “tyranny” of poultry companies that do not give margin

title: Kerala Assembly polls heat up as major fronts step up campaigns and identity politics takes centrestage
content: The electoral battle in Kerala is shaping up as a direct confrontation between the ruling CPI(M)-led LDF and an invigorated Congress-led UDF, with the BJP-led NDA struggling to muscle in as a third force in the sweepstakes

title: World becoming more multi-polar, democratisation of global order underway: Jaishankar
content: The remarks were made in his brief speech to the convocation ceremony of Nalanda University at Rajgir in Bihar, which was attended, among others, by President Droupadi Murmu

title: IPL 2026 in Bengaluru: Minors hired to steal mobile phones during RCB vs SRH match, police recover 21 phones worth ₹18 lakh
content: A key accused has been taken into custody, along with a few juveniles suspected to be involved in the crime

title: Dalai Lama backs Pope Leo's peace appeal, urges to end global conflicts
content: Calling for global unity, the Dalai Lama urged people worldwide to work towards peace and prayed for an early end to ongoing violence and conflicts

title: India strengthening its role as reliable semiconductor supplier in global market, says PM Modi
content: The Prime Minister said the inauguration of the facility strengthens India’s push towards self-reliance, which marks a landmark step in building a robust semiconductor ecosystem

title: The five most polarizing MLB teams of 2026: Should you believe in Red Sox, Astros?
content: Is your team a threat to win big -- or a disappointment waiting to happen? It depends on who is asked.

title: The six rookies off to the hottest starts of 2026
content: From Chase DeLauter to JJ Wetherholt, these young players are making an immediate impact for their teams.

title: Yanks go 5-for-5 on ABS challenges; Boone irked
content: The Yankees won all five of their challenges utilizing the automated ball-strike system during Monday night's game against the Mariners.

title: Bulls waive guard Ivey after anti-gay comments
content: The Chicago Bulls waived guard Jaden Ivey after his recent anti-gay comments amid several rants on religion and other topics.

title: 'Nature calls': Edwards misses tipoff in return
content: Timberwolves star Anthony Edwards missed the start of Monday night's game in his return from a six-game absence because he had to go to the bathroom.

title: S. Carolina into sixth straight Final Four over TCU
content: South Carolina walloped TCU on Monday night to return to the Final Four for the sixth year in a row as just the second team to do so in NCAA history.

title: Wemby posts 3rd-fastest double-double since '97
content: Victor Wembanyama had a season-high 41 points and 16 rebounds while collecting the third-fastest double-double since 1997-98 in the Spurs' win Monday.

title: Lakers' Redick stumps for Doncic to be NBA MVP
content: Coach JJ Redick says that if Luka Doncic and the Lakers close out the regular season as hot as they've been, Doncic should be named the NBA's MVP.

title: Ujiri joins ownership group of Toronto Tempo
content: Former Raptors president Masai Ujiri has joined the ownership group of the city's new WNBA franchise.

title: SGA on MVP chatter: 'I let my game do the talking'
content: Calling the discourse around NBA MVP "good chatter," Thunder star Shai Gilgeous-Alexander nevertheless declined to weigh in himself, saying, "No, I'm good. Thanks for asking, though. ... I let my game do the talking."

content: Matt Miller predicted every pick in the 2026 NFL draft, from the Raiders' selection at No. 1 to the Broncos' Mr. Irrelevant slot at the end of Round 7.

content: The Alabama product is regarded as the 2026 NFL draft's QB2 despite having far fewer starts (15) than most first-round signal-callers.

content: Max Verstappen predicted F1's new rule set would underwhelm, and 2026 is proving him correct, so much so that he might just quit the sport entirely.

content: According to Jokic, the explanation behind Clark's high praise for him Sunday night is simple: The two share an agent.

title: "Come Close, We're Waiting": Iran As US Expands Mideast Military Footprint
